title: Duration column added after Timeline should auto populate duration
excerpt: I would like to submit a request for this feature: if you add a numbers column (duration) to a board, then connect the timeline column to it, then any dates in the timeline column should show up automatically in the dura…

posts.author: MaggieB (Maggie Boler)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like to submit a request for this feature: if you add a numbers column (duration) to a board, then connect the timeline column to it, then any dates in the timeline column should show up automatically in the duration/numbers column.

Currently you have to go back into the timeline and reset the date to get them to show up in the duration. See the attached video for demonstration.
